dashboard.plugInHint: Plug in a mouse and available settings will appear here.
dashboard.noDpiStages: Device did not report DPI stage information.
dashboard.dpiWriteUnavailable: DPI writing is not available for this device or plugin.
dashboard.writeFailed: Write failed, UI retained the device's real state: {{error}}
dashboard.currentPollingRateEdit: Current polling rate: {{value}} Hz, click to edit
dashboard.pollingRateNotReportedEdit: Polling rate not reported, click to set
dashboard.pollingWriteHint: Selecting a polling rate writes to the device immediately and confirms via read-back.
dashboard.pollingReadonlyHint: Showing the device's current reported state; writing is not available for this device or plugin.
dashboard.writeUnavailableHint: This write is not available for the current device.
dashboard.detailsNote: Below is the full read-only report returned by the signed device plugin; verified writable items are provided as separate controls in the main interface.
dashboard.noCapabilities: Device did not report extended capability fields.
dashboard.pluginUpdateFoundBody: {{count}} installed plugin(s) have new versions available. Update them in Settings → Plugins.

theme.label: Theme mode
theme.hint: Follow system adapts to light or dark automatically

autostart.label: Launch at login
autostart.hint: Start Mira automatically when you log in

startHidden.label: Hide window on launch
startHidden.hint: Stay in the menu bar/tray without showing the main window

trayBattery.label: Show battery percentage
trayBattery.hint: The mouse icon still fills by battery level; this only controls the number beside it
trayBattery.disabledHint: Windows system tray doesn't support showing text beside the icon

trayIconColor.label: Tray icon color
trayIconColor.hint: White suits dark menu bar backgrounds, black suits light backgrounds, auto follows the theme

receiverBattery.label: Include receiver battery in title
receiverBattery.hint: Always show all device batteries in the tray menu

trayConnection.label: Show connection in menu
trayConnection.hint: Display connection type and device name in the tray menu

refreshInterval.label: Refresh interval: {{seconds}} s
refreshInterval.hint: Fallback polling interval when the window is visible; event-triggered reads are immediate, hidden windows drop to 60 s

updateCheck.label: Check for Mira updates on launch
updateCheck.hint: Check for new versions online after launch and notify in-app

updateInstall.label: Auto download & install
updateInstall.hint: Automatically install new versions when found, prompt to restart when done, never force-interrupt your work

lowBattery.label: Low battery threshold: {{value}}%
lowBattery.hint: Notify once via system notification when battery crosses the threshold; no alert while charging
lowBattery.tooltip: Low battery alert: notifies only once when crossing the threshold, no repeated pop-ups.

nightMode.label: Enable quiet lighting
nightMode.hint: Automatically turn off lighting when triggers are met and restore the previous state afterwards
nightMode.tooltip: Quiet lighting: turns off lighting based on trigger scenes and reliably restores the previous state when conditions clear. Only applies when lighting is writable.
nightMode.triggerTimeHint: Turn off lighting during a scheduled period
nightMode.triggerThemeHint: Turn off lighting when system switches to the specified theme
nightMode.triggerChargingHint: Turn off lighting while the mouse is charging
nightMode.triggerLowBatteryHint: Turn off lighting when battery is below {{value}}%
nightMode.targetReceiverHint: Turn off/restore receiver lighting (only settable when device supports it)

config.hint: Export device config for backup or migration; import checks plugin compatibility and applies item by item.

pluginUpdateCheck.label: Check for plugin updates on launch
pluginUpdateCheck.hint: Only checks signed plugins for new versions, never silently replaces plugins

pluginUpdate.noPlugins: No installed plugins found. The official installer bundles mira.amaster by default.

privacy.telemetryHint: Mira has no built-in telemetry; this option is always on
privacy.scanHint: List real HID devices matching installed plugins (for hardware testing)
privacy.diagnosticsHint: Diagnostics data is sanitized, no serial numbers or HID payloads

about.label: View about page
about.hint: Version, plugins, contact, license and disclaimer

about.title: About
about.disclaimer: Mira is an independent little tool, with no authorization, partnership, or endorsement from any manufacturer. We keep it honest: capabilities not verified on real hardware are not presented as stable support.

donate.hint: If you'd like to support me with a donation, I'd truly, truly appreciate it 🙏!!

about.noBundledPlugins: No bundled plugins found. The official installer bundles mira.amaster by default.
about.updateEnabledHint: Auto update is enabled; you can manually check for new versions.
about.updateDisabledHint: Auto update is disabled. Download new versions manually from the GitHub Release page.
about.licenseHint: Mira is licensed under AGPL-3.0-or-later; original documentation uses CC-BY-SA-4.0. Third-party dependencies retain their original licenses.
about.viewLicenseDisabled: View open source license (requires GitHub link)
about.privacyHint: Mira has no built-in telemetry, accounts, ads, or always-on network services. Diagnostics export is sanitized, no device serial numbers or HID payloads. No data is uploaded without your confirmation.
about.reportIssueHint: Do not paste unsanitized serial numbers or sensitive logs when reporting issues.

updateFound.title: New Mira version available
updateFound.body: v{{version}} is available. View and install it on the About page.

updateInstalled.title: Mira update installed
updateInstalled.body: The new version takes effect after you click "Relaunch to finish update".

pluginUpdateFound.title: Plugin updates found
pluginUpdateFound.body: {{count}} installed plugin(s) have new versions available. Update them in Settings → Plugins.

notification.writeFailedBody: The UI retained the device's real state: {{error}}
notification.mutationUnavailableBody: Official software (Logi Options+, G HUB, AMaster) may be holding the device. Close it and retry.
notification.autostartFailed: Failed to set launch at login
notification.checkPluginUpdateFailed: Failed to check for plugin updates
